jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at IndiaMart
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? IndiaMart in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiaMart:
IndiaMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart!
